title: Miners Newmont and Barrick Gold are under pressure but good alternatives in S&P
text: Year-to-date has seen many stocks trade lower on tighter macro-economic environments. S&P 500 has so far lost 17%, while the tech-heavy Nasdaq-100 is down 27%.

title: The Top 5 Gold Stocks to Buy Now
text: Here are undervalued gold stocks to buy that can out-perform the markets on concerns of inflation, recession and geopolitical tensions. The post The Top 5 Gold Stocks to Buy Now appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: 3 Commodity Stocks Struggling With Overhead Resistance
text: Commodity stocks weren't spared during the recent market crash. Here's how to profit from the continued unwind.
